workflow_runs.name: Build and Release
workflow_runs.display_title: Revert all CreatePokemon modules to original build

head_commit.message:
Revert all CreatePokemon modules to original build

Restores CreatePokemonSVModule, SWSHModule, PLAModule, PLZAModule,
BDSPModule, and LGPEModule to their pre-session state. No showdown
processing or legality logic was ever changed in our session — only
embed display code. This fully undoes those display changes too.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

head_commit.message:
